title: Contracts; recordation
doc_html:
§223.  Contracts; recordation

An executed copy of the contract shall be recorded in the mortgage records of the parish in which the municipality is located and shall be binding upon the parties thereto as of the date such contract is so filed for recordation.

Added by Acts 1975, No. 142, §1.
doc_text:
§223.  Contracts; recordation
An executed copy of the contract shall be recorded in the mortgage records of the parish in which the municipality is located and shall be binding upon the parties thereto as of the date such contract is so filed for recordation.
Added by Acts 1975, No. 142, §1.
